# SafetyOf.AI — EU AI Act Compliance Platform

> 48-hour EU AI Act compliance gap analysis, continuous monitoring, and HMAC-signed attestations for AI systems. From £5,000 per audit. 218 MCP servers for automated compliance.

## Services
- [EU AI Act Gap Analysis](https://safetyof.ai/compliance): 48-hour compliance audit with signed attestations, £5,000 fixed price
- [Continuous Monitoring](https://safetyof.ai/regulatory): Real-time compliance drift detection, from £79/mo
- [Free Compliance Scan](https://safetyof.ai/scanner): Instant AI risk classification under EU AI Act
- [Byzantine Council](https://safetyof.ai/byzantine): 33-agent multi-AI consensus verification
- [Threat Intelligence](https://safetyof.ai/threat-intel): Real-time threat detection across 4 databases

## Frameworks Covered
- EU AI Act (Articles 4-72, Annex III high-risk systems)
- DORA (Digital Operational Resilience Act)
- NIS2 (Network and Information Security Directive)
- ISO 42001 (AI Management System)
- GDPR (Data protection for AI systems)
- SOC 2 (Trust Service Criteria)
- NIST AI RMF (Risk Management Framework)

## Pricing
- Free: 3 compliance scans/day
- Pro: £79/mo — unlimited scans, audit reports, MCP tools
- Enterprise: £499/mo — full audit trails, HMAC attestations, priority support
- Audit: £5,000 one-time — 48-hour comprehensive gap analysis

## MCP Servers
- 218 compliance MCP servers available on Smithery and PyPI
- Install: `npx meok-setup --pack governance`
- GitHub: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp

- [Pricing](https://safetyof.ai/pricing): Plans and features
- [Regulatory Tracker](https://safetyof.ai/regulatory): Live EU AI Act deadline countdown
- [Compliance Scanner](https://safetyof.ai/scanner): Free AI risk classification
